name: wildhaven-ai-homes-twin
description: The Pre-Founder twin of Wildhaven AI Homes. The brand operates in public, in this repo, before the team incorporates. Built on the RAPP digital-organism platform; descended from kody-w/RAPP via the rappid lineage chain.
_attestation_note: When kody-w/RAPP adopts release signing, this variant's attestation will be issued by rapp's release key asserting (parent_rappid, parent_commit, child_rappid). See pages/vault/Architecture/Signed Releases and Variant Attestation.md in the parent repo.
